# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_state_name_assign = {
    if = { # Greek
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    has_discrimination_trait = language_greek
                }
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_greek

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_greek
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_greek
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_greek
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_greek
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_greek
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Imperial Russia (Autocratic Empire)
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    cu:russian ?= this
                }
                RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
                country_has_voting_franchise = no
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_russian

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_russian_tsargrad # Tsargrad
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_russian
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Imperial Russia
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    cu:russian ?= this
                }
                NOT = {
                    RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
                }
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_russian

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_russian # Konstantinopol
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_russian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_russian
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Turkish
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    has_discrimination_trait_group = language_group_turkic
                }
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_turkish

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_turkish
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_turkish
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_turkish
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_turkish
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_turkish
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Bulgarian Monarchy
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    has_discrimination_trait = language_bulgarian
                }
                RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_bulgarian

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_bulgarian_tsarigrad
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_bulgarian
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Bulgarian Non-Monarchy
        limit = {
            owner = {
                any_primary_culture = {
                    has_discrimination_trait = language_bulgarian
                }
                NOT = {
                    RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
                }
            }
        }

        set_state_name = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_bulgarian

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_city_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = farm
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_farm_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = wood
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_wood_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = mine
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_mine_bulgarian
        }

        set_hub_name = {
            type = port
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_EASTERN_THRACE_port_bulgarian
        }
    }
    else = { # By putting an else at the end that resets the names we ensure that the names are switched back to their defaults if anyone else takes the states
        reset_state_name = yes
        reset_hub_names = yes
    }
}

REPLACE:STATE_CAMBODIA_state_name_assign = {
    if = { # Khmer
        limit = {
            owner = {
                country_has_primary_culture = cu:khmer
            }
        }
        set_state_name = STATE_CAMBODIA_khmer
    }
    else_if = { # Vietnamese
        limit = {
            owner = {
                country_has_primary_culture = cu:vietnamese
                RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
            }
        }
        set_state_name = STATE_CAMBODIA_vietnamese_monarchy

        set_hub_name = {
            type = city
            name = HUB_NAME_STATE_CAMBODIA_city_vietnamese
        }
    }
    else_if = { # French
        limit = {
            owner = {
                country_has_primary_culture = cu:french
            }
        }
        set_state_name = STATE_CAMBODIA_french
    }
    else = { # By putting an else at the end that resets the names we ensure that the names are switched back to their defaults if anyone else takes the states
        reset_state_name = yes
        reset_hub_names = yes
    }
}

REPLACE:STATE_LAOS_state_name_assign = {
    if = { # Vietnamese
        limit = {
            owner = {
                country_has_primary_culture = cu:vietnamese
                RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
            }
        }
        set_state_name = STATE_LAOS_vietnamese_monarchy
    }
    else = { # By putting an else at the end that resets the names we ensure that the names are switched back to their defaults if anyone else takes the states
        reset_state_name = yes
        reset_hub_names = yes
    }
}
